metadata.title: Unforecast Project - Ceremony of Gratitude and Growth
metadata.description: A capstone project by final-year BUV Events Management students. Join us on March 14th, 2026 at British University Vietnam, Ecopark.

hero.title: Unforecast Project
hero.description: A capstone project by final-year BUV Events Management students

discovery.storyParagraph1: We have created Unforecast Project as the final milestone of our journey as Events Management students at British University Vietnam.
discovery.storyParagraph2: By embracing uncertainty as an inherent aspect of event management, Unforecast Project supports continuous learning and reflective practice, marking the organizers' transition from academic learners to practice-ready event management professionals.
discovery.storyParagraph3: Through this event, the Organizing Team aims to foster a space for connection, while expressing our sincere appreciation to those who have supported and accompanied Phuong Thao, Phuong Ha, Minh Thu, and Bao Han throughout our journey.

members.name: Nguyen Phuong Thao
members.bio: I chose to start Unforecast Project because I cannot forecast how it will take shape. Yet perhaps that uncertainty is exactly what makes this journey meaningful. The more events I organize, the more I realize that unpredictability is always part of the process. This project gave me the courage to step into the unknown and try something different, while also inviting me to look back at my journey of learning and creating events. It is not only about completing a project for graduation, but also about understanding myself and the journey behind it.

members.name: Nguyen Thi Minh Thu
members.bio: As a final-year student, Unforecast Project is not only a graduation project for me but also a milestone that reflects my three-year journey of learning and growth at BUV. Being part of this project has helped me better understand the importance of responsibility, teamwork, and the ability to adapt to unpredictable situations in the event industry. Although there were many challenges along the way, those experiences helped me grow, learn valuable practical lessons, and create a truly memorable journey.

members.name: Nguyen Thuy Bao Han
members.bio: Becoming part of the Unforecast Project was something I never expected when I first entered BUV. True to its name, "Unforecast," the project brought many surprises and challenges. Each challenge or spontaneous idea brought new experiences. The spontaneity and spirit of teamwork throughout the project created a memorable and unforgettable journey for me.

members.name: Nguyen Phuong Ha
members.bio: For me, the Unforecast Project is more than just an assignment. It represents our passion and the mark I hope to leave during my journey at BUV. Through the Unforecast Project, my team and I hope to transform the unexpected into something magical, creating meaningful moments and unforgettable memories throughout our three-year journey at BUV.

journey.heading: Project Phases
journey.galleryBody: Featuring local specialities and traditional dishes from the hometowns of the four team organizers - Nam Dinh, Bac Ninh, Hai Phong, and Hanoi. This charity fundraising initiative by the Unforecast Project brings cultural spirit and regional stories to life through food, interactive activities, and shared experience.

phases.title: Main event: Ceremony of Gratitude & Growth
Post-event: Charity trip to Saint An Bui Chu Orphanage
